UK OFFICIAL SENSITIVE 
UK OFFICIAL SENSITIVE 
briefings 
 for Russia/Ukraine, China, CT, the 
Middle East and Cyber.  How much time can we have in Lord Mandelson’s schedule?  Would 
it be possible to carve out +/- 2hrs between 0945 – 1200?   
 
 
From: 
  
Sent: 08 January 2025 16:06 
To: Chief Private Office Team <
> 
Cc: 
 Head of US Global Issues & Canada GBR GOV (FCDO) 
>;

(FCDO)

Subject: 
 - HMA-Designate Washington - C meeting
CLASSIFICATION: UK SECRET UK EYES ONLY 
Hello All, 
Please see below a request for C to meet Lord MANDELSON on 
. It sounds as if this is 
already on your radar. FCDO colleagues cced. But please let me know if you need me to get 
involved in teeing this up. 
Best wishes, 
 
 
From: 
 Intelligence Policy Desk Officer GBR GOV (FCDO) 
> 
Sent: 08 January 2025 10:28 
To: 
 
Cc: 
 Head of US Global Issues & Canada GBR GOV (FCDO)

Subject: HMA-Designate Washington - C meeting 
Classification: UK SECRET UK EYES ONLY 
, 
The US desk has received the below request from Lord Mandelson (HMA-Designate 
Washington) to meet with C. They believe he has agreed with Richard directly to meet 
, I

181


UK OFFICIAL SENSITIVE 
UK OFFICIAL SENSITIVE 
would be grateful if you can pass onto your Private Office so 
 can help set up the 
meeting. 
STARTS 
Lord Mandelson, HMA-Designate Washington, wishes to meet C in January prior to his 
posting to Washington. He is eager to learn more about your cooperate with the US 
Intelligence Community and understand how he can best support your objectives from the 
Embassy – where he will 
. He will of course come into regular contact with intelligence 
work in his role and he is clear that he wants to ensure UK-US cooperation in this essential 
area remains deep with the incoming administration. He would be pleased to travel to your 
office, or host you at the FCDO. He intends to meet the other Agency Heads too. 
ENDS 
Many thanks, 
 
 | Intelligence Policy Desk Officer | Intelligence Policy 
Department | National Security Directorate | 
 
This information is exempt from disclosure under the Freedom of Information Act 2000 and 
may be subject to exemption under other UK information legislation.  Refer disclosure 
requests to the originating Agency.
